overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit storefronts, busy intersections, and narrow vendor-lined streets. The footage is from a video game engine (Cyberpunk 2077), showcasing heavy rainfall, reflective wet surfaces, and futuristic urban architecture with dense neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with neon storefronts and glass railings

events.description: heavy rain begins falling, increasing in intensity and creating reflections on the wet pavement

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered pedestrian walkway, passing illuminated blue benches and neon-lit storefronts

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians standing near the purple neon building entrance

entered.detail: circular building facade with bright purple neon lighting and vertical Japanese signage
transparent glass safety barrier with metal frame along the walkway edge
futuristic blue illuminated bench with smooth curved design
overhead glass and metal canopy protecting from rain

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a covered pedestrian walkway at night, with a distinctive circular building featuring bright purple neon lighting on the left. The camera moves forward past futuristic blue benches and glass railings, while heavy rain begins to fall around the 5-second mark, creating reflective wet surfaces on the concrete sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with yellow crosswalk markings and traffic signals

events.description: exits the covered walkway and enters the open intersection exposed to heavy rain
begins crossing the wide intersection following the yellow-striped crosswalk

agents.ego_description: stepping off the curb and walking across the wide intersection with other pedestrians through the rain

notable_agents.action: futuristic car waiting at the intersection for pedestrians to cross

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing covering the multi-lane street
towering skyscrapers with illuminated windows and large digital displays
suspended traffic signal with red light illuminated

segments.scene_description: Exiting the sheltered walkway, the scene opens into a wide urban intersection exposed to heavy rainfall. The camera crosses the broad yellow-striped crosswalk while futuristic vehicles wait at the traffic signal. Towering buildings with illuminated facades rise in the background as the rain creates shimmering reflections on the asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide intersection crossing with heavy rain and vehicle traffic

events.description: camouflaged SUV drives past from right to left across the crosswalk
futuristic blue car drives by on the left side of the frame

agents.ego_description: continuing across the wide intersection through heavy rain, approaching the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: camouflaged SUV driving across the crosswalk from right to left

entered.detail: massive illuminated advertisement screen displaying animated content on building facade
industrial building with large circular ventilation fans on the exterior wall

segments.scene_description: Continuing across the wide intersection, a camouflaged SUV passes by from right to left. The camera moves past large digital billboards and an industrial building with prominent ventilation fans. The heavy rain persists, creating a cyberpunk atmosphere with neon reflections on the wet crosswalk stripes.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow city street with food vendors, neon signage, and street furniture

events.description: reaches the opposite sidewalk and enters a narrower street with vendor stalls
passing street food vendor cart with glowing green light and cooking equipment

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow sidewalk past street vendors and illuminated storefronts in the rain

notable_agents.action: vendor standing beside food cart with illuminated green lighting

entered.detail: street food cart with illuminated green lighting and cooking equipment
metal barrel with open fire providing warmth on the sidewalk
bright red neon signage mounted on building wall

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrower street lined with vendor carts and neon signs. The camera passes a food vendor cart with distinctive green lighting and a burning barrel on the sidewalk. The enclosed space creates a more intimate atmosphere with red neon signage reflecting off the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered plaza with escalators, stairs, and vending machines

events.description: enters covered plaza area with escalators and overhead protection from rain
begins ascending stairs to upper plaza level

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs into a covered plaza area with vending machines and digital displays, escaping the rain

entered.detail: mechanical escalator and concrete stairway leading upward to upper level
solid overhead canopy sheltering the plaza from rain
red illuminated vending machine with product displays
large screen displaying animated advertisements and video content

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters a covered plaza protected from the rain, featuring escalators and stairs leading upward. The camera ascends the stairs past a red vending machine and large digital billboards. The environment shifts from exposed street to sheltered urban plaza with overhead lighting and architectural elements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered pedestrian walkway through a rain-drenched urban intersection and into a covered plaza. It begins under a canopy beside a circular building with purple neon lighting, moving past blue benches as heavy rain starts to slick the concrete surfaces. As the camera exits the shelter, the scene opens into a wide, exposed intersection where the camera crosses yellow-striped asphalt amidst shimmering reflections and waiting futuristic vehicles. The movement continues past digital billboards and a camouflaged SUV before shifting into a narrower street lined with green-lit vendor carts and a burning barrel. Finally, the environment transitions from the open, rainy street into a sheltered plaza, ascending stairs past a red vending machine and large digital displays.
